rows.label: tev072601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about Orphe Parfait' director.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask On'tonam if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about the mech Goetia uses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about the battle with the Zu Pharg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask On'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0001
rows.name:
We'll be providing technology to you
humans through our state-of-the-art arms
manufacturing company, Orphe Parfait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0002
rows.name:
It doesn't really matter who
calls himself the director, but
I ended up taking on the role.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0003
rows.name:
When you equip yourself with gear
comprised of our technologies, you
can evade any attack with ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0004
rows.name:
And our range of ether- and gravity-based
weapons will surely prove effective
against a variety of enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I am certain our products will benefit you
in battle, so please give them a try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0010
rows.name:
We Orphe are connected through
our Ovah. Even when we are
apart, our paths are the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0011
rows.name:
But the Growth, and you humans,
do not possess a share of the
Ovah within your bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Do you understand how frightening
it is to have beings beside you whose
thoughts you cannot comprehend?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0013
rows.name:
We fear a potential future where
you humans abandon the treaty
and turn your weapons on us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0014
rows.name:
If that happens, the Orphe would
surely perish. But we would see
that you pay appropriately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0019
rows.name:
I was most impressed with
your victory over Almandal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0020
rows.name:
The Growth had all of our Orphe technicians
assigned to work on that machine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0021
rows.name:
We had believed that human Dolls
would be no match for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0022
rows.name:
But I suppose we can chalk that up to a difference
in pilot skill. Our technology was probably too
much for that squid woman to handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0027
rows.name:
The Growth had all of the
technicians in its service
working hard to complete that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0028
rows.name:
It might not be an exaggeration to say
that it was the most horrific weapon of
mass eradication anywhere in the galaxy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0029
rows.name: And to think that you destroyed it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0030
rows.name:
If I'm being perfectly honest, I've
come to believe that humanity is far
more terrifying than the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0035
rows.name:
We Orphe have developed countless weapons since
arriving on this planet. Yet our technology was
never developed with the intention of causing harm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Our technology gradually developed
over our eons of history as a way
to increase our odds of survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0037
rows.name:
When we are finally free of our enemies, I would
like to return to focusing on the device that puts
our technology to its original intended use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0038
rows.name:
And that is transforming barren
wastelands into lush, green paradises...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG0039
rows.name:
I speak, of course, of the
all-purpose Orphean super-planter![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG1001
rows.name:
I must admit that allying with
an Ovah-less species like yours
made me very uneasy at first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG1002
rows.name:
But through your cumulative efforts to
cooperate with our species, you humans have
proven yourselves more than trustworthy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG1003
rows.name:
In anticipation of the possibility that
we might be betrayed, I made contingency
plans to obliterate this entire area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG1004
rows.name:
But as that possibility no
longer exists, I will see to
it that such plans are scrapped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG2001
rows.name:
Everyone who was ensnared by
Run'tonam's dangerous ideas
has died along with her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG2002
rows.name:
Now that the truth is known, all those who were
deceived by her ridiculous vision of an anti-Ovah
revolution seem to have come to their senses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG2003
rows.name:
Now we must renew our bonds of unity
and strengthen them even further for
the sake of our species' survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG2004
rows.name:
We must resume living our lives in absolute
deference to the voices of our Ovah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG2005
rows.name:
Thank you for informing us of that fool's
fate. It is because of you that we are able
to return to our rightful way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG3001
rows.name:
We have always entrusted everything to our
Ovah, but now we must attain a consciousness
that transcends the Ovah itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG3002
rows.name:
It will not be easy, but now that we have
acceded to Run'tonam's final wish, I believe
we will be able to begin the process of change.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG3003
rows.name:
Thank you for bringing her
right hand back to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072601_MSG3004
rows.name:
We will embrace our new future
and work hand in hand with humanity
to survive on this world![ST:wait ]
